name: signingDeleteKey
title: Delete Key (Signing Service)
description: Permanently deletes an Ed25519 key from the peer's signing service key store. Requires authentication. This is an elevated operation — on first call (without confirmToken), returns a confirmation URL that the user must visit in a browser to approve. After approval, retry with the confirmToken to complete the deletion. WARNING: this is irreversible — the key cannot be recovered. Part of the signing service: see also signingServiceInfo, signingCreateKey, signingListKeys, signingSign, signingGetJWT, signingImportKey, signingExportKey, signingChangePassphrase.

publicKey.description: Public key identifying which key to delete (hex string)

passphrase.description: Passphrase used when the key was created or imported (verifies ownership)

confirmToken.description: Confirmation token from browser approval (omit on first call)

deleted.description: true if the key was successfully deleted

status.description: confirmation_required when user approval is needed

confirmUrl.description: URL for user to visit and approve the operation

confirmToken.description: Token to include when retrying after approval
